rationale: outcome.go defines Outcome, Disposition, ParkReason, AllParkReasons, ParkReasonValid, and ToOutcome/FromOutcome adapters; tests cover round-trip across all dispositions/park reasons and the closed vocabulary; no external callers of try.Outcome yet.

findings.summary: FromOutcome drops RecordEvents (documented in code comment); inverse parity is preserved on canonical reports.
ParkReasons without dedicated status (cost_cap, loop_error, rate_limit_budget_exhausted, quota_paused, lock_contention) round-trip via ExecutionFailed+Detail; tests confirm parity.
